series_metadata.series_description: Personal Service contracts entered into with state veterinarians, state stewards, state presiding judges, hearing officers, dept. of agriculture and any others on behalf of the Racing Commission.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current fiscal year 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: current fiscal year 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved
